title: Line Cook
description: Prepare and cook menu items according to our recipes and quality standards. Maintain a clean and organized kitchen station.
requirements: 1+ year of cooking experience preferred
Ability to work in a fast-paced kitchen environment
Knowledge of food safety and sanitation practices
Must be able to stand for extended periods
Reliable and punctual

title: Sushi Chef
description: Prepare sushi, sashimi, and specialty rolls for our buffet sushi bar. Ensure freshness and presentation standards are met.
requirements: 2+ years of sushi preparation experience
Knowledge of fish handling and food safety
Attention to detail and presentation
Ability to work efficiently during peak hours

title: Kitchen Prep Cook
description: Assist with food preparation including chopping, marinating, and portioning ingredients for daily service.
requirements: Basic kitchen experience helpful but not required
Willingness to learn and follow instructions
Ability to work mornings and early shifts
Must follow food safety guidelines

title: Cashier / Front Counter
description: Greet customers, process orders and payments, and maintain a clean front-of-house area. Provide excellent customer service.
requirements: Previous customer service experience preferred
Friendly and professional demeanor
Basic math and cash handling skills
Ability to work weekends and holidays

title: Buffet Attendant
description: Maintain the buffet line, replenish food items, ensure cleanliness, and assist customers with questions about menu items.
requirements: No experience required — training provided
Must be dependable and team-oriented
Ability to lift up to 30 lbs
Available for evening and weekend shifts

title: Shift Manager
description: Oversee daily restaurant operations during assigned shifts. Supervise team members, ensure food quality and safety, manage inventory, and handle customer concerns.
requirements: 2+ years of restaurant management or supervisory experience
Strong leadership and communication skills
Knowledge of food safety regulations
Ability to manage a team of 10-15 employees
Available to work varied schedules including weekends

title: Restaurant General Manager
description: Lead all aspects of restaurant operations including staff management, financial performance, food quality, customer satisfaction, and compliance with company standards.
requirements: 3-5 years of restaurant general management experience
Proven track record of meeting financial targets
Strong people management and development skills
Experience with P&L management
Food safety certification

title: District Manager
description: Oversee operations of 8-12 restaurant locations in the Northeast region. Drive performance, ensure brand standards, develop general managers, and support new location openings.
requirements: 5+ years of multi-unit restaurant management experience
Track record of developing high-performing teams
Strong financial acumen and P&L experience
Willingness to travel 50-60% within the region
Bachelor's degree preferred

title: Marketing Coordinator
description: Support marketing campaigns, manage social media channels, coordinate local store marketing initiatives, and assist with brand development across all China Star Group concepts.
requirements: 1-3 years of marketing experience
Experience with social media management tools
Strong writing and communication skills
Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite or Canva
Bachelor's degree in Marketing or related field

title: Human Resources Coordinator
description: Support HR operations including recruitment, onboarding, employee relations, and benefits administration for our growing team of 1,500+ employees.
requirements: 1-2 years of HR experience
Knowledge of employment law and HR best practices
Experience with HRIS systems
Strong organizational and interpersonal skills
Bachelor's degree in HR or related field

title: IT Support Specialist
description: Provide technical support for POS systems, networking, and office technology across all restaurant locations and corporate office.
requirements: 2+ years of IT support experience
Experience with POS systems (NCR, Toast, or similar)
Knowledge of networking and basic cybersecurity
Excellent troubleshooting skills
Willingness to travel occasionally to restaurant locations
